provenance: Curated public-record summary of pre-event sector commentary (early March 2023).
title: Funding costs rise across U.S. regional banks
raw_text: Analysts flagged rising funding costs across U.S. Regional Banks as deposits reprice higher; unrealized losses on bank bond portfolios remained a watch item heading into March.

provenance: Curated public-record summary; benign macro noise (no watchlist entity).
title: Futures steady ahead of Powell testimony
raw_text: U.S. equity futures were little changed ahead of Federal Reserve Chair testimony to Congress; broad technology shares were steady in premarket trade.

provenance: Benign control: a real non-bank holding mentioned with no downside content.
title: Microsoft expands Copilot AI across product suite
raw_text: Microsoft said it would expand its Copilot AI assistant across its product suite, citing strong enterprise demand and growth in cloud services.

provenance: SVB Financial Group (CIK 0000719739) Form 8-K and mid-quarter update, filed after market close 2023-03-08.
title: SVB Financial 8-K: $21B securities sale at a loss; capital raise launched
raw_text: SVB Financial Group (SIVB), parent of Silicon Valley Bank, disclosed in an 8-K the sale of approximately $21 billion of available-for-sale securities at an after-tax loss of about $1.8 billion, and launched a roughly $2.25 billion capital raise to strengthen its balance sheet amid deposit pressure.

provenance: Moody's downgrade of SVB Financial Group announced 2023-03-08.
title: Moody's downgrades SVB Financial Group
raw_text: Moody's Investors Service downgraded SVB Financial Group (Silicon Valley Bank), citing deposit outflows, funding pressure, and the realized loss on its securities portfolio.

provenance: Curated public-record summary of 2023-03-09 trading and deposit-run reporting.
title: Silicon Valley Bank shares plunge as venture firms pull deposits
raw_text: Shares of Silicon Valley Bank (SIVB) fell sharply as venture capital firms reportedly advised portfolio companies to withdraw deposits; analysts warned of an accelerating deposit run and a liquidity squeeze at the bank.

provenance: Curated public-record summary of 2023-03-09 regional-bank contagion selloff.
title: Regional bank stocks slide on contagion fears
raw_text: Regional bank stocks slid on contagion fears after Silicon Valley Bank's troubles. First Republic, Western Alliance, Signature Bank and PacWest all fell sharply amid concerns over uninsured deposits and unrealized bond losses.

provenance: Curated public-record summary; First Republic deposit-stability reporting 2023-03-09.
title: First Republic moves to reassure clients on liquidity
raw_text: First Republic Bank moved to reassure clients about liquidity and deposit stability as its shares dropped, pointing to what it called a diversified deposit base and available borrowing capacity.

provenance: FDIC press release pr23016: closure of Silicon Valley Bank and appointment of FDIC as receiver, 2023-03-10.
title: Regulators close Silicon Valley Bank; FDIC named receiver
raw_text: Regulators closed Silicon Valley Bank and the FDIC was named receiver following a deposit run, in what became the largest U.S. bank failure since 2008. Deposit outflows had overwhelmed the bank's liquidity.

provenance: Curated public-record summary of 2023-03-10 contagion reporting on Signature Bank.
title: Signature Bank hit by withdrawals as panic spreads
raw_text: Signature Bank faced heavy deposit withdrawals as regional-bank panic spread following the Silicon Valley Bank collapse, raising concerns about its crypto-linked deposit base.
